name: Better Than Fanny Farmer Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cream cheese, powdered sugar, butter, honey, vanilla, and sweetened condensed milk in a bowl. Blend until smooth.
2. Quickly add the melted chocolate and nuts to the mixture.
3. Pour the batter into a buttered pan and spread it about 1 inch thick.
4. Chill the fudge until set.
5. Cut into squares.
